activeWork.progress: Phase C fully implemented via bead-chain skill. Expert panel (4 agents) reviewed spec, found 9 MUST-FIX items (config race, ext:: injection, AllowedRegistries, etc). All addressed in spec v2. 27 beads executed with TDD (test→impl→validate). 64 component tests + 52 app-level tests + 4 golden files. Registry add modal with 9 validation checks, hand-rolled text input, radio source toggle. Sync and remove wired via existing confirmModal + toast patterns. registryOpInProgress flag with complete lifecycle.

recentDecisions: Full Phase Chain with expert panel for Phase C (not quick feature — user chose thoroughness)
TDD bead pattern: test (red) → impl (green) → validate (conventions) — 3 beads per unit
Hand-rolled text input (not bubbles/textinput) — consistency with editModal
Config mutation via fresh LoadGlobal() in tea.Cmd closures — never mutate a.cfg from goroutine
No 'sync all' — [S] always syncs selected registry only
Registry remove dispatched via existing confirmModal + itemName field (no new fields on confirmModal)
Tab label distinction: isRegistriesTab checks topbar 'Registries' (plural), gallery tabLabel is 'Registry' (singular)
keySync scoped to Registries tab only — was breaking Library sort when global
Success criteria must be runnable commands with exit codes, not prose descriptions
nextSteps: Commit and push Phase C changes (44 uncommitted files)
Live smoke test in real TUI: [a] Add, [S] Sync, [d] Remove on Registries tab
Phase D (Add Wizard) or other priority work from bd ready
Close Phase B epic (syllago-5us6u) if no remaining issues

context.notes: Implementation plan at ~/.claude/plans/ancient-noodling-minsky.md — very detailed, used as source of truth for all subagents. The [a] button on Library/Content tabs is Phase D (Add Wizard, not yet built). Loadouts tab intentionally has no [a] per design doc. Branch protection still OFF on main. 44 uncommitted files include Phase C code AND uncommitted hook spec changes from a prior session.
